name: understanding-by-reconstruction
description: Reverse-engineer software logic from compiled outputs, rebuild source code from executables, recover development intent from deployed artifacts, reconstruct algorithms from black-box behavior, invert function outputs to inputs, extract semantic understanding from binary traces, unlock model pretraining through output-to-source reconstruction—essential for code forensics, model training, architecture recovery, legacy system analysis, and intellectual property research.
paperTitle: Understanding by Reconstruction: Recover Source Code and Development Intent from Output
